curation_notes: Patch commit f92a9ef modifies only Parse-Dashboard/app.js (plus a new test file). The fix extracts the agent route handler into a named function and registers it behind authentication and CSRF middleware. It also adds cross-app access control and read-only enforcement. Location derived directly from the patch diff: the vulnerable route definition app.post('/apps/:appId/agent', ...) resided in the main module export function in app.js with no authentication middleware.
